description: Tasks rewritten to match actual generated data

tasks.instruction: Start a one-time purchase of the main domain using a credit card with US billing details and proceed to the secure checkout step.
tasks.name: Start a one-time purchase of the main domain using a credit card with US billing details and proceed to the secure checkout step.
tasks.description: Start a one-time purchase of the main domain using a credit card with US billing details and proceed to the secure checkout step.

tasks.instruction: From the main domain page, choose a lease-to-own plan with monthly auto-pay by selecting the cheapest available plan whose monthly price is under $150 and start checkout.

target_names: 12-month/24-month/36-month/48-month plans for main domain (select 48-month under threshold)

tasks.name: From the main domain page, choose a lease-to-own plan with monthly auto-pay by selecting the cheapest available plan whose monthly price is under $150 and start checkout.
tasks.description: From the main domain page, choose a lease-to-own plan with monthly auto-pay by selecting the cheapest available plan whose monthly price is under $150 and start checkout.

tasks.instruction: Add the main domain to your cart, then from the similar-domain suggestions add the shortest available .com domain priced under $3,000, and proceed to checkout with both domains.
tasks.name: Add the main domain to your cart, then from the similar-domain suggestions add the shortest available .com domain priced under $3,000, and proceed to checkout with both domains.
tasks.description: Add the main domain to your cart, then from the similar-domain suggestions add the shortest available .com domain priced under $3,000, and proceed to checkout with both domains.

tasks.instruction: On the main domain page, use the Make Offer option to submit the lowest offer amount that the form will accept based on the displayed Buy Now price, including your contact details and a short message about negotiating the price.

expected_values.message: I would like to negotiate this price according to my budget.

tasks.name: On the main domain page, use the Make Offer option to submit the lowest offer amount that the form will accept based on the displayed Buy Now price, including your contact details and a short message about negotiating the price.
tasks.description: On the main domain page, use the Make Offer option to submit the lowest offer amount that the form will accept based on the displayed Buy Now price, including your contact details and a short message about negotiating the price.

tasks.instruction: Use the currency selector to view the main domain price in USD first, then switch to EUR, and finally to GBP so the page ends with the price shown in GBP.
tasks.name: Use the currency selector to view the main domain price in USD first, then switch to EUR, and finally to GBP so the page ends with the price shown in GBP.
tasks.description: Use the currency selector to view the main domain price in USD first, then switch to EUR, and finally to GBP so the page ends with the price shown in GBP.

tasks.instruction: From the landing page FAQ, expand the questions about payment options, the domain transfer process, and refunds or cancellations, then use the support link in the FAQ to open the contact form and send a message asking about the transfer process.

target_names: What payment options are available for buying this domain?
How does the domain transfer process work after I pay?
Do you offer refunds or cancellations after purchasing the domain?

expected_values.contact_message: I read the FAQ but still have questions about the transfer process for this domain.

tasks.name: From the landing page FAQ, expand the questions about payment options, the domain transfer process, and refunds or cancellations, then use the support link in the FAQ to open the contact form and send a message asking about the transfer process.
tasks.description: From the landing page FAQ, expand the questions about payment options, the domain transfer process, and refunds or cancellations, then use the support link in the FAQ to open the contact form and send a message asking about the transfer process.

tasks.instruction: Use the similar-domain alerts form to subscribe with your email, selecting a budget range covering $1,000–$5,000, exactly two categories (one tech-related and one business-related), weekly frequency, and agreeing to marketing before submitting.
tasks.name: Use the similar-domain alerts form to subscribe with your email, selecting a budget range covering $1,000–$5,000, exactly two categories (one tech-related and one business-related), weekly frequency, and agreeing to marketing before submitting.
tasks.description: Use the similar-domain alerts form to subscribe with your email, selecting a budget range covering $1,000–$5,000, exactly two categories (one tech-related and one business-related), weekly frequency, and agreeing to marketing before submitting.

tasks.instruction: In the seller contact section, request a phone call by filling in your name, email, and phone number, choosing phone as the preferred contact method, selecting a $5,000–$10,000 budget range, mentioning a 30-day purchase timeline in your message, and submitting the form.

expected_values.message: I would like to discuss buying this domain within the next 30 days. Please call me on weekdays after 3 PM.

tasks.name: In the seller contact section, request a phone call by filling in your name, email, and phone number, choosing phone as the preferred contact method, selecting a $5,000–$10,000 budget range, mentioning a 30-day purchase timeline in your message, and submitting the form.
tasks.description: In the seller contact section, request a phone call by filling in your name, email, and phone number, choosing phone as the preferred contact method, selecting a $5,000–$10,000 budget range, mentioning a 30-day purchase timeline in your message, and submitting the form.

tasks.instruction: From the main domain seller’s portfolio, filter to .com domains priced between $2,000 and $3,000, open the first one whose name has at most 10 characters, then on its page choose the longest lease-to-own plan with a monthly price under $200 and begin checkout.
